title: Crops Re-Crafted
description: Adds a spice to crops and nature related item textures!
body:
![In-game screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/443b91d514e31948b0631ba7ddab396d4809f6f0_0.webp)

About 🥕

Crops Re-crafted is a pretty small resource pack that gives some spice to vanilla crops and nature related item textures. Like seeds, mushrooms and other foods.

That's about it, for the moment i didn't touch the blocks only the items, probably in the future tho!
